task_completion.description: Verify that a new style named 'optimized_places' has been created in the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Styles' page showing 'optimized_places' in the list of styles, with 'ne' listed in the Workspace column.

task_completion.description: Verify the style is configured with a size 6 red circle symbol and black Arial 12px bold labels using the 'name' attribute.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer SLD editor showing XML tags for PointSymbolizer (WellKnownName 'circle', fill '#FF0000', size '6') and TextSymbolizer (PropertyName 'name', font Arial/12/bold, fill '#000000').

task_completion.description: Verify the specific VendorOptions for label placement are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer SLD editor showing the exact tags: <VendorOption name="autoWrap">80</VendorOption>, <VendorOption name="maxDisplacement">50</VendorOption>, and <VendorOption name="spaceAround">10</VendorOption>.

task_completion.description: Verify 'optimized_places' is set as the default style for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page for 'ne_populated_places', under the 'Publishing' tab, showing 'optimized_places' selected in the 'Default Style' dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify a map preview image focused on Europe is exported to /home/ga/places_optimized.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command (like wget, curl, or cp) saving the image to '/home/ga/places_optimized.png', or an image viewer/file manager displaying the saved map preview showing Europe with red circles and labels.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GeoServer web interface to create and configure the style.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GeoServer admin UI in a web browser, not just a local text editor modifying an SLD file.

integrity.description: Verify the exported image is generated from GeoServer's layer preview.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using GeoServer's 'Layer Preview' (OpenLayers or WMS request) to generate the map image before saving it.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the file to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager explicitly showing the path '/home/ga/places_optimized.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an SLD style named 'optimized_places' in GeoServer 2.25.2. The style must include specific VendorOptions: autoWrap (80), maxDisplacement (50), and spaceAround (10). The target layer is 'ne:ne_populated_places' (Natural Earth 1:10m populated places). The final output must be a map preview image saved exactly to '/home/ga/places_optimized.png'.
